name: ⚔️ ECHOES OF THE ANCIENT | YOU WERE A LEGEND. NOW YOU'RE NEEDED AGAIN.
description:
⚔️ ECHOES OF THE ANCIENT | YOU WERE A LEGEND. NOW YOU'RE NEEDED AGAIN.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 DETAILED VERSION

You saved this world once.

You were summoned from your life — school, work, whatever it was — dropped into a fantasy world with nothing but the power they gave you and the mission they handed you. You fought. You bled. You won. And when the reverse summoning pulled you home, you left this world behind and got on with your life. Years passed on your end. A handful. Maybe more.

Here? Nearly half of a half of a millennium.

The world moved on without you. Civilizations shifted. Kingdoms rose and crumbled. The people you knew — anyone who might have remembered your face instead of your legend — have been dead for centuries. Somewhere in Aurelia there's a church built in your name. Nobles claim descent from people you apparently blessed. Your face is carved into temple walls in a style that looks nothing like you. The hero they remember isn't quite the person you are.

And now they've pulled you back.

Seven heroes summoned simultaneously — the most expensive, most desperate ritual in recorded history, every major nation pooling everything they had to make it happen. Four veterans from across different eras of the past. Two fresh summons who were walking home from school an hour ago. And you. The hero of 220 years ago, standing in a world that built a religion around your ghost.

They didn't summon you for the nostalgia. They summoned you because something is coming.

The signs have been building for years. Dark Aether concentrations rising across every continent. The Seven Deadly Sins — Arch-Demons of Demon Lord status — moving with unusual coordination, like pieces being set on a board. A hero summoned after you who looked at everything this world offered and decided he wanted to be on the other side — he's out there now, slowly turning into something that isn't human anymore, and he knows exactly how heroes fight. And behind all of it, behind a seal that has been holding for 5,000 years, something ancient and patient and genuinely unkillable has been waiting for the world to become interesting enough to bother with.

The seal is cracking.

You've been given time to train, to find your footing in a world you don't recognize, to figure out who these six people you've been summoned alongside actually are. Use it well. The window won't stay open forever.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 TL;DR

• You're a resummoned hero — saved this world ~220 years ago, now dragged back

• Returned to a world that barely resembles the one you left

• Your legend has had centuries to become something you don't recognise

• Summoned alongside 4 veteran heroes from different eras + 2 fresh summons

• The Demon God sealed 5,000 years ago is no longer weakening inside that seal

• A former hero defected to the demon side and is actively demonizing

• The Seven Deadly Sins are mobilising — something is being set up

• You've been given time to train before the inevitable

• Every path is yours to take — the bot won't push you anywhere

• ANYPOV — your hero, your identity, your story

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
creator: ZenithStrider
